families.recentCatchEvidence: required artifact and CI wiring checks are active in the migrated Veritas proof lane
families.expiryOrReviewTrigger: review when Veritas policy artifacts and CI report checks are enforced entirely by upstream policy evaluation
families.rationale: These checks protect the repository trust contract before product code is read.

families.replacementTestAvailable: partial via TypeScript and focused package tests
families.expiryOrReviewTrigger: promote only after a targeted mutation proves boundary failures are missed by normal tests
families.evidenceBasis: candidate inventory; no recent catch evidence recorded
families.rationale: Import ownership and package boundary checks can stop high-impact AI regressions, but exact assertions should not be required without catch evidence.

families.replacementTestAvailable: partial via Vitest component and hook coverage
families.expiryOrReviewTrigger: move repeated raw-fetch regressions into an AST/static rule or retire after SDK hook tests cover the boundary
families.evidenceBasis: candidate inventory; no recent catch evidence recorded
families.rationale: Raw fetch bans guide AI toward SDK hooks, but many assertions are source-shape checks and should be advisory until proven.

families.recentCatchEvidence: connected-agents suite is routed for src-server changes and covers provider/orchestration/event-store contracts
families.expiryOrReviewTrigger: retire remaining source-string runtime assertions when connected-agent tests and route-selection tests cover the same regressions
families.evidenceBasis: test:connected-agents plus Veritas route-selection regression test
families.rationale: Provider, orchestration, ACP, and Codex runtime behavior should be tested behaviorally and routed through Veritas.

families.recentCatchEvidence: scheduler schema export was fixed during the migration and is now covered by static/unit checks
families.expiryOrReviewTrigger: delete duplicate source assertions after replacement tests fail for removed schema exports
families.evidenceBasis: scheduler schema export fix and static/unit coverage
families.rationale: Route schemas and request behavior are product behavior and should live in normal tests selected by Veritas.

families.expiryOrReviewTrigger: expire after three clean releases or when route/import tests prove retired surfaces cannot be reached
families.evidenceBasis: candidate inventory; no recent catch evidence recorded
families.rationale: Deleted-surface tombstones are useful during migration, but should not become permanent default blockers.

families.expiryOrReviewTrigger: remove when a changed file causes the assertion to fail without user-visible regression
families.rationale: Exact helper names and must-not-inline strings often preserve historical refactor shape rather than evidence-based truth.

families.recentCatchEvidence: work-agent migration revealed repeated needs for proof-family evidence, candidate lanes, and expiry
families.expiryOrReviewTrigger: promote when at least two repos need the same verification shape
families.evidenceBasis: work-agent brownfield migration produced upstream Veritas changes
families.rationale: Veritas should absorb reusable evidence and routing shapes, not work-agent-specific assertions.
